title: raukaua edgerleyi
intro: Raukaua edgerleyi, also known as the Edgerley's Raukaua, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand, belonging to the family Araliaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Raukaua edgerleyi include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and discomfort. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
